docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARCO AKA MARCO A. EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARCO AKA MARCO A. PEREZ

ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steve Levy, Esq. 800-637-6922 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MARCO PEREZ.

Denied. The wage garnishment is limited to the maximum of 10% of net income or $251.44 a month unless wages decrease.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
